detail.description:
Welcome to Arrows – Puzzle Escape, a minimalist puzzle game that challenges your logic, planning, and spatial thinking. Your goal is simple: extract each arrow without causing a collision. 

🧠 Features:
- Challenging logic puzzles that test your planning skills
- Thousands of handcrafted levels with increasing complexity
- Clean, minimalist design that lets you focus on the puzzle
- Relaxing, no-pressure gameplay – no timers, just your brain
- Hint system to help when you're stuck
